node.text: A page from the earliest known code for BASIC for the Altair, copyright 1975.
BASIC for the Altair 4K and 8K was Microsoft’s first shipping product, and its first format was paper tape. 🤯 Pictured here is an actual copy of the original software.

Fun fact: Bill and Paul noticed the Altair 8800 on the cover of Popular Electronics Magazine. The Altair had an Intel 8080 microprocessor as its brain, and that meant that people could write real software for it.
Microsoft was founded on April 4, 1975. We’re celebrating our 46 years in style. 🎉
